description_long: This is a round, rustic bread roll with a golden-brown, slightly uneven crust. The surface displays a natural, crackled texture with a prominent split or scoring on one side, suggesting it was baked in a traditional oven. The crust appears crisp and firm, while the base shows a lighter, flour-dusted area. The bread's overall shape is domed and plump, with subtle color gradients from pale cream to deep amber. There are no visible seeds, branding, or packaging, and the bread looks freshly baked and unsliced.
description: A round, rustic bread roll with a golden-brown, crackled crust and a prominent split on one side. The surface is crisp and flour-dusted, with no visible branding or packaging.
description_view_0: A domed, golden-brown bread roll with a smooth, crackled crust and no visible scoring.
description_view_1: The bread roll shows a deep split or scoring along the top, highlighting its rustic baking style.
description_view_2: A rounded side view with a smooth, even crust and subtle color gradients, no visible scoring.
description_view_3: The base of the bread is visible, showing a pale, flour-dusted area and the end of the scoring.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a rustic, crackled appearance with a prominent split or scoring along one side. There is a light dusting of flour on the base, and the surface is uneven and naturally textured.
